    1. get(Method)

Class MethodCache<T>

java.lang.Object
com.habbashx.cache.method.MethodCache<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the cached value (typically MethodMeta)
public class MethodCache<T> extends Object
Thread-safe, lazy cache that maps a Method to a computed value of type T.

The first time a method is requested, the provided parser function is invoked to produce the value, which is then stored. Subsequent requests for the same method return the cached value without invoking the parser again.

Backed by ConcurrentHashMap for safe use across multiple threads.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MethodCache(Function<Method,T> parser)
    Creates a new cache with the given parsing function.

    get(Method method)
    Returns the cached value for the given method, computing it on first access.

  • Constructor Details

    • MethodCache

      public MethodCache(Function<Method,T> parser)
      Creates a new cache with the given parsing function.
      Parameters:
      parser - function that computes the cached value from a Method; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • get

      public T get(Method method)
      Returns the cached value for the given method, computing it on first access.
      Parameters:
      method - the method whose metadata is requested
      Returns:
      the cached (or freshly computed) value for method
